## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` (backend)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` (backend)
- [ ] `npm run lint` (frontend)
- [ ] `npm run build` (frontend)
- [ ] Manual check via `docker compose up` when applicable
